scripts.test:local: node --no-warnings=ExperimentalWarning --experimental-strip-types scripts/record-run.mjs --id=npm-test --name="npm run test" --category=Command -- npm run test:run
scripts.test:run: npm run health && npm run test:vt-fake-agent && node scripts/run-test-parallel.mjs
scripts.test:run:serial: npm run health && npm --workspace webapp run test
scripts.check: node --no-warnings=ExperimentalWarning --experimental-strip-types scripts/record-run.mjs --id=npm-check --name="npm run check" --category=Command -- npm run check:run
scripts.check:run: npm --workspace webapp run check && npm run lint && npm run lint:verify-cytoscape-rules && npm run lint:blackbox-tests
scripts.check:e2e-taxonomy: node --no-warnings=ExperimentalWarning --experimental-strip-types scripts/record-run.mjs --id=e2e-taxonomy --name="E2E Taxonomy" --category=Static --display="npm run check:e2e-taxonomy" -- npm run check:e2e-taxonomy:run
scripts.health: node --no-warnings=ExperimentalWarning --experimental-strip-types scripts/record-run.mjs --id=npm-health --name="npm run health" --category=Command -- npm run health:run
scripts.health:duplication: node --no-warnings=ExperimentalWarning --experimental-strip-types scripts/record-run.mjs --id=duplication --name="Code Duplication (jscpd)" --category=Static --display="npm run health:duplication" -- npm run health:duplication:run
scripts.health:duplication:run: jscpd --config .jscpd.json backend cloud_functions packages scripts tools webapp/src
scripts.health:duplication:report: jscpd --config .jscpd.json --threshold 100 backend cloud_functions packages scripts tools webapp/src
scripts.health:complexity: node --no-warnings=ExperimentalWarning --experimental-strip-types scripts/record-run.mjs --id=complexity --name="Complexity Health" --category=Static --display="npm run health:complexity" -- npm run health:complexity:run
scripts.health:mutation: node --no-warnings=ExperimentalWarning --experimental-strip-types scripts/record-run.mjs --id=mutation --name="Mutation Testing (Stryker)" --category=Other --display="npm run health:mutation" --slow -- npm run health:mutation:run
scripts.lint: node --no-warnings=ExperimentalWarning --experimental-strip-types scripts/record-run.mjs --id=root-lint --name="Root ESLint" --category=Lint --display="npm run lint" -- npm run lint:run
scripts.lint:verify-cytoscape-rules: node --no-warnings=ExperimentalWarning --experimental-strip-types scripts/record-run.mjs --id=verify-cytoscape-rules --name="Cytoscape Lint Rules" --category=Lint --display="npm run lint:verify-cytoscape-rules" -- npm run lint:verify-cytoscape-rules:run
scripts.lint:blackbox-tests: node --no-warnings=ExperimentalWarning --experimental-strip-types scripts/record-run.mjs --id=blackbox-tests-lint --name="Blackbox Test Lint" --category=Lint --display="npm run lint:blackbox-tests" -- npm run lint:blackbox-tests:run
scripts.check:dead-code: node --no-warnings=ExperimentalWarning --experimental-strip-types scripts/record-run.mjs --id=dead-code --name="Dead Code (knip)" --category=Static --display="npm run check:dead-code" -- npm run check:dead-code:run
